headlines.title: FCC directs Disney-owned TV stations to file early license renewals
headlines.description: The Federal Communications Commission issued an order Tuesday directing Disney’s eight owned-and-operated television stations to file their broadcast license renewals ahead of schedule

headlines.title: Tech stocks slide following report on OpenAI missing key targets
headlines.description: Tech stocks slid Tuesday after The Wall Street Journal published a report warning that ChatGPT-maker OpenAI was falling short of revenue and user targets, fueling concerns about whether the tech industry’s multitrillion-dollar investment in AI will eventually pay off

headlines.title: United Arab Emirates quits OPEC as Iran war raises Gulf tensions
headlines.description: U.S. crude oil surpassed $100 per barrel for the first time since April 10 after Iran talks stumbled and the United Arab Emirates said it would leave OPEC.

headlines.title: U.S. appears cool on Iran proposal to end war and reopen Hormuz without a nuclear deal
headlines.description: The United States showed little immediate enthusiasm for a new Iranian proposal that would end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz without resolving the impasse over the Islamic Republic's nuclear program.

headlines.title: UAE announces it will leave OPEC
headlines.description: The United Arab Emirates said it would leave the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries after being a part of the group that coordinates oil output among the world’s top producers for over five decades. NBC News’ Christine Romans reports on the motivations behind the UAE’s withdrawal.

headlines.title: Warner Bros. shareholders approve Paramount Skydance merger
headlines.description: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders voted to approve the company’s acquisition by Paramount Skydance, clearing another hurdle for the multibillion-dollar merger. NBC News' Chloe Melas reports on what is expected to happen next in the process.

headlines.title: How to Talk Finances With Family (and Why It's Important)
headlines.description: A survey found that 62% of people do not discuss money with their loved ones, so Yanely Espinal, director of educational outreach at Next Gen Personal Finance, joins TODAY to share advice on how to start those important conversations. Tips include focusing on values and financial goals when discussing money with other adults, asking high school children about their financial literacy curriculum, and introducing concepts of budgeting and foundations early in a child’s life.

headlines.title: Here's Your Checklist for Giving Your Finances a Reset
headlines.description: Is your baseline spending creeping up? Are you paying for monthly subscriptions you're not using? NBC’s chief business correspondent Christine Romans joins TODAY with tips for resetting your finances, including bumping up your 401(k) contributions, auditing your monthly spending, reviewing insurance and tax documents, and more.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: White House ramps up pressure on ABC to fire Jimmy Kimmel over first lady remark
headlines.description: The White House on Tuesday intensified pressure on ABC to fire late-night host Jimmy Kimmel over a comment he made about first lady Melania Trump last week.

headlines.title: Trump officials point finger at Democrats and the media for political violence
headlines.description: The president struck a conciliatory tone Saturday night, but administration officials later accused journalists and Democrats of fueling divisive rhetoric.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S. and state gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national and state prices at the pump.
